learning_outcomes.statement: Analyze common misconceptions related to Sprint 42 contracts and identify their impact on contract application.
learning_outcomes.notes: Focus on identifying errors or misunderstandings in contract use.

learning_outcomes.statement: Demonstrate correct application of Sprint 42 contracts in an in-person delivery context through scenario-based exercises.
learning_outcomes.notes: Use live capture scenarios to practice accurate contract application.

learning_outcomes.statement: Evaluate learner misconceptions during the workshop and provide constructive feedback to correct misunderstandings.
learning_outcomes.notes: Emphasize formative assessment and feedback skills.

alignment_notes: Outcomes focus on misconception identification, practical application, and feedback within the Sprint 42 contract context and in-person delivery.
